item.title: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
item.description: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.
item.media:keywords: Anthropic, department of defense, artificial intelligence, Military, military tech, Defense
item.dc:creator: Paresh Dave
item.dc:subject: Model Fight

item.title: How Invisalign Became the World’s Biggest User of 3D Printers
item.description: Joe Hogan, Align Technology’s plastics-nerd CEO, says you shouldn’t eat with your aligners and that you don’t need to wear your retainers every night.
item.media:keywords: 3-D printing, Silicon Valley, manufacturing, artificial intelligence, medicine
item.dc:creator: Paresh Dave
item.dc:subject: Brace For It

item.title: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
item.description: Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.
item.media:keywords: artificial intelligence, privacy, data breaches, chatbots
item.dc:creator: Lily Hay Newman, Matt Burgess
item.dc:subject: Sears Has Everything

item.title: Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
item.description: Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.
item.media:keywords: scams, Crime, artificial intelligence, security, cryptocurrency, cybersecurity
item.dc:creator: Matt Burgess
item.dc:subject: The Ol' Switcharoo

item.title: Google's AI Search Results Love to Refer You Back to Google
item.description: The company's generative AI search tools increasingly cite its own services, like Google Search and YouTube, over third-party publishers.
item.media:keywords: Google, search engines, Search, artificial intelligence, SEO
item.dc:creator: Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Closed Loop

item.title: China’s OpenClaw Boom Is a Gold Rush for AI Companies
item.description: Hype around the open source agent is driving people to rent cloud servers and buy AI subscriptions just to try it, creating a windfall for tech companies.
item.media:keywords: Made in China, China, open source, artificial intelligence, generative AI, agentic AI
item.dc:creator: Zeyi Yang
item.dc:subject: Made in China

item.title: Gamers’ Worst Nightmares About AI Are Coming True
item.description: From the global RAM shortage driving up console prices to job loss in the industry, gaming is shaping up to be one of the AI boom's biggest casualties.
item.media:keywords: video games, artificial intelligence, Console Games, Microsoft, gaming culture, xbox
item.dc:creator: Helen Vogelsong-Donahue
item.dc:subject: End Game

item.title: Palantir Demos Show How the Military Could Use AI Chatbots to Generate War Plans
item.description: Software demos and Pentagon records detail how chatbots like Anthropic’s Claude could help the Pentagon analyze intelligence and suggest next steps.
item.media:keywords: Palantir, Anthropic, department of defense, Military, military tech
item.dc:creator: Caroline Haskins
item.dc:subject: Robot Generals

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Anthropic’s DOD Lawsuit, War Memes, and AI Coming for VC Jobs
item.description: In today’s episode, we discuss how the saga between Anthropic and the Department of Defense is far from over.
item.media:keywords: Uncanny Valley Podcast, podcasts, Anthropic, OpenAI, artificial intelligence, department of defense, Donald Trump, politics, Venture Capital
item.dc:creator: Brian Barrett, Zoë Schiffer, Leah Feiger
item.dc:subject: Uncanny Valley

item.title: Google Is Not Ruling Out Ads in Gemini
item.description: WIRED spoke with Nick Fox, Google’s SVP of knowledge and information, about how AI is changing the company’s advertising business.
item.media:keywords: Model Behavior, artificial intelligence, Google, DeepMind, Advertising, Google Gemini
item.dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff
item.dc:subject: Model Behavior
